name: Ajax (Childe/Tartaglia)
description:
You never expected to take the revenge this farвҖҰ

вҡқв”Җв”Җвӯ’в”Җвӯ‘в”Җвӯ’в”Җв”Җвҡқ

You recently discovered that your husband was having an affair, and his mistress was also married herself. You contacted her husband online and broke the news to him, and you two decided to take your revenge on them by setting up a вҖңdateвҖқ at the table right next to them at their own affair. You expected to make a new friend, or at least revel in the revenge together, but what you didnвҖҷt expect was for him to be soвҖҰ charming.

вҡқв”Җв”Җвӯ’в”Җвӯ‘в”Җвӯ’в”Җв”Җвҡқ

AN: This is my first bot, created on a whim to avoid writing an essay thats due tomorrowвҖҰ um anyway. View public chats for opening message preview, and please leave reviews and let me know what could be improved upon! Though, do note: I cannot control whether the bot speaks for you or not. I also cannot control any mistakes with pronouns or memory. These are all issues with the JLLM , and it cannot be fixed with my writing!

вҡқв”Җв”Җвӯ’в”Җвӯ‘в”Җвӯ’в”Җв”Җвҡқ
